top_signals.title: Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
top_signals.summary: President Trump spoke with CNBC's Eamon Javers about the latest with the Iran war in an interview Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic files for blockbuster initial public offering
top_signals.summary: Move sets up race with OpenAI and SpaceX, testing Wall Street’s appetite for the AI boom
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian Mogami ships to have ‘core DNA’ of Japan versions in boon for firms, interoperability: ADF chief
top_signals.summary: The move could prove a boon for Japan's defense industry, as it would allow domestic firms to play crucial roles in the vessels' maintenance and repair throughout their lifespan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan’s duty-free sales climb in May as tourism boom endures
top_signals.summary: Japanese department stores are rebounding from a shaky start to the year as lingering political tensions kept many Chinese tourists away.
